records.question: Which physicians have a social security number at least 777777777 and also have a department where they are the head, as well as records in affiliated_with, trained_in, and undergoes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN affiliated_with ON physician.employeeid = affiliated_with.physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN undergoes ON physician.employeeid = undergoes.physician
WHERE physician.ssn >= 777777777
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
WHERE p.SSN >= 777777777
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Department d WHERE d.Head = p.EmployeeID)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Affiliated_With aw WHERE aw.Physician = p.EmployeeID)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Trained_In ti WHERE ti.Physician = p.EmployeeID)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Undergoes u WHERE u.Physician = p.EmployeeID)

records.question: Which physicians lead the Surgery department and have certifications that started on or after 2008-01-01 and expire exactly on 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE trained_in.certificationexpires = '2008-12-31' AND department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
WHERE p.EmployeeID IN (
  SELECT d.Head
  FROM Department d
  WHERE d.Name = 'Surgery'
)
AND p.EmployeeID IN (
  SELECT t.Physician
  FROM Trained_In t
  WHERE t.CertificationDate >= '2008-01-01'
  AND t.CertificationExpires = '2008-12-31'
)

records.question: Which Surgical Attending Physicians were trained on or before 2008-01-01 in procedures that cost at least 5600.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN procedures ON trained_in.treatment = procedures.code
JOIN undergoes ON procedures.code = undergoes.procedures
WHERE physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician' AND trained_in.certificationdate <= '2008-01-01' AND procedures.cost >= 5600.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
JOIN Trained_In ti ON p.EmployeeID = ti.Physician
JOIN Procedures pr ON ti.Treatment = pr.Code
WHERE p.Position = 'Surgical Attending Physician'
AND ti.CertificationDate <= '2008-01-01'
AND pr.Cost >= 5600.0

records.question: Which physicians are Attending Psychiatrists with an SSN of at least 999999999 who worked with nurses where the position is Nurse, and those nurses were on call on or after 2008-11-04 11:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN appointment ON physician.employeeid = appointment.physician
JOIN nurse ON appointment.prepnurse = nurse.employeeid
JOIN on_call ON nurse.employeeid = on_call.nurse
WHERE physician.ssn >= 999999999 AND nurse.position = 'Nurse' AND on_call.oncallstart >= '2008-11-04 11:00' AND physician.position = 'Attending Psychiatrist'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
WHERE p.Position = 'Attending Psychiatrist'
  AND p.SSN >= 999999999
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Undergoes u
    WHERE u.Physician = p.EmployeeID
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM Nurse n
        WHERE n.EmployeeID = u.AssistingNurse
          AND n.Position = 'Nurse'
          AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM On_Call oc
            WHERE oc.Nurse = n.EmployeeID
              AND oc.OnCallStart >= '2008-11-04 11:00'
          )
      )
  )
